arts.ttl: Slavia Prague v Ajax Preview: Amsterdam club face tricky tie against inform Czech side
arts.sum: Ajax head to Prague on Thursday evening looking to keep up their good start to the Europa League campaign. Last time out they beat Besiktas 4-0 at home and have…

arts.ttl: Matthijs de Ligt highlights difference between Erik ten Hag at Man Utd and Ajax
arts.sum: Summer signing Matthijs de Ligt played for Erik ten Hag on his best days in coaching at Ajax and is now experiencing the Man Utd chief's lowest days at Old Trafford
